candidates.why: Explicit total current assets line on the balance sheet; matches ACT exactly.
Malformed/combined label and not a clean current-assets total.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit balance-sheet total for current assets.

candidates.why: Balance-sheet cash and cash equivalents style label; best match for CHE.

candidates.row_label: Cash and bank balances at the end of period
candidates.why: Cash flow closing cash, but CHE should come from the balance sheet when available.

variables.notes: Used the balance-sheet cash line rather than cash-flow closing cash.

candidates.why: Explicit total current liabilities line; matches LCT exactly.

Best semantic match for current short-term debt because a current-liabilities-section Borrowings total is shown; however the same label also appears in non-current liabilities, creating ambiguity in this export.
Clearly current portion of long-term debt and excludes leases, but may omit other short-term borrowings such as revolving credit facility/current bank loans.
Current financing liability component under current liabilities; useful only if no clean total exists.
Could be part of current debt in the current-liabilities section, but the label also appears in non-current liabilities.

variables.notes: Preferred the current-liabilities total 'Borrowings' as STD, but the identical row label also appears in non-current liabilities, so this export is ambiguous and should be checked manually. Lease rows were excluded.

candidates.row_label: Income Taxes and value added tax
candidates.why: Current-liabilities tax-related line; best available proxy for taxes payable/current tax liabilities.
Deferred taxes are non-current/non-operating and not taxes payable.

final_choice.row_label: Income Taxes and value added tax

variables.notes: No shortlist candidate existed. Chose the explicit current-liability tax line as the best match for taxes payable.

candidates.why: Best match for total/net property, plant and equipment; preferred over gross-only component lines.
Gross plant/equipment is only a component and excludes land/property; less preferred than total PPE.

variables.notes: No shortlist candidate provided the clean total PPE line; selected the explicit net PPE label outside the shortlist.

candidates.why: Explicit total assets line; exact match for AT.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit balance-sheet total assets line.

candidates.row_label: Net cash generated from (used in) operating activities
candidates.why: Direct net operating cash flow line; best match for OANCF.

candidates.why: Operating cash before interest and taxes, not the final net operating cash flow.

final_choice.row_label: Net cash generated from (used in) operating activities
